title: Repurposed End
description: I have added 3 new mobs including a new wither, skeleton , and wither skeleton, a new item called dragon scale which the ender dragon drops on death, can make new tools sets of armor and more with it.
body:
I have added 3 New mobs into the game which are the Ender Skeleton and Crying Wither Skeleton which spawn in the end. Then I have added a totally Reworked Wither that has more health and can be spawned using crying oby instead of soul sand. On Death it will also drop a New Enchantment that has been added into the game which is the Wither Effect Enchantment that can be put onto your sword, axe or mase.

On death the ender dragon will drop 2 mini scales. I have found that respawning the ender dragon is pretty useless so this gives you more of a reason to! It takes 4 mini scales and 4 ender eyes to craft one Dragon Scale. It then pretty much works like netherite does you can craft the upgrader put it into a smithing table and upgrade your netherite armor to be even more op and keep all of you enchantments you already have. This works for Tools and Armor.

This is kind of a modpack with all of the new things I have added so lets say you like the wither but you do not like all of the other mobs I will be spliting it all up so if you follow my curse forge you can stay up to date with the changes I make. PLEASEEEEEEE let me know if you run into any bugs I am not master coder at all and I am sure I have made plenty of mistakes. But otherwise THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING IT!
